author: senna-lang
description: Claude Code's /ide, with your knowledge graph attached. Select text and it's pushed to Claude with the graph expanded: embeds inlined, linked notes summarized, heading path and backlinks. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: senna-lang
manifest.description: Claude Code's /ide, with your knowledge graph attached. Select text and it's pushed to Claude with the graph expanded: embeds inlined, linked notes summarized, heading path and backlinks. Zero config, no extra server.
manifest.name: Graph Context for Claude Code

name: Graph Context for Claude Code

releases.author: senna-lang
releases.description: Refreshed plugin description: leads with the graph-context + push differentiator, with zero-config as a secondary point. No functional changes.

releases.author: senna-lang
releases.description: Harden filesystem access: all fs writes/deletes are now guarded to .../ide/<port>.lock only (isLockFilePath). Added a README 'Filesystem access' section explaining the lock-file requirement. No functional change to the IDE integration.

releases.author: senna-lang
releases.description: Fix manifest description (length + wording) per automated review. No functional changes from 0.1.0.

releases.author: senna-lang
releases.description: Initial release. Claude Code IDE integration (/ide) for Obsidian with expanded graph context: heading path, frontmatter, section/block-precise embed expansion (depth-1), wikilink summaries, backlinks. Pushed with the selection and available via getSelectionWithContext / getNoteExpanded (on-demand note loading). Includes 1-hop prefetch, per-note context memoization, LRU caches, link dedup, and selection debounce. Install: copy main.js + manifest.json into <vault>/.obsidian/plugins/graph-context-for-claude-code/ and enable. Desktop only.
